Title: bonzi
Name: Bonzi Buddy
About:
{p}Hi, im bonzi, the cat that steals your {sub 'diacetylmorphine' 'heroin'} and {sub 'α-Pyrrolidinopentiophenone' 'α-PVP'} 🫠{Ep}

Last substance α-Pyrrolidinopentiophenone (40 mg)

Complications: triple {wkp 'cardiac arrest'} because of polysubstance overdose
{wkp 'akathisia'} induced by antipsychotics (extreme feeling of restlessness)

TriedSubstances.Name: N-Ethyl-nor-hexedrone
Effects: {xeff 'anticipatory response'} {xeff 'stimulation'} after dosing (probably because I know it's a potent {class 'stimulant'})
{sev 'intense'} {xeff 'focus enhancement'}, then {xeff 'focus suppression'} after redosing a lot
Adverse: {sev 'light'} {xeff 'headache'} on {sev 'strong'} doses
long-lasting nose numbing ({xeff 'tactile suppression'}), short-acting nose pain and {xeff 'runny-nose' 'nasal congestion'} when snorted
{xeff 'increased heart rate'} (+100 bpm)
{sev 'intense'} {xeff 'compulsive redosing'} ({wkp 'comedown_(drugs)' 'comedown'} prominent)
{xeff 'delusion'} (very paranoid and persecutory) during most of the experience (overvalued belief that people are following me despite having no clear evidence)

{xeff 'psychosis'} that caused some {xeff 'auditory-hallucination?s=external' 'partially defined embedded hallucinations'}, {xeff 'auditory misinterpretation'} (hearing voices from people around saying that i'm high but they are just talking and people calling my name) that produced {xeff 'thought loops'}
{xeff 'pupil dilation'}
very {sev 'intense'} {xeff 'dry mouth'}, sipping water every 5 min ({xeff 'dehydration'}) and {wkp 'chapped lips'} that hurt for some days
{sev 'intense'} {xeff 'muscle tension'} and {sev 'moderate'} {xeff 'muscle twitching'} all over my body ({wkp 'comedown_(drugs)' 'comedown'} prominent)
{sev 'intense'} {xeff 'teeth chattering'} (this produced some jaw pain the following days) and {xeff 'teeth grinding'}

{sev 'strong'} and long-lasting {xeff 'shakiness'} that produced severe {xeff 'motor-control-loss' 'hand tremors'} (i try to avoid grabbing things in front of people because it makes it so obvious that i'm {xeff 'sensory-overload' 'tweaking'}
{sev 'intense'} {xeff 'appetite suppression'} and {xeff 'dehydration'} (lost 2-3kg in less than a week of daily use)
{sev 'light'} {xeff 'nausea'} when coming down ({wkp 'comedown_(drugs)' 'comedown'})
{xeff 'temporary erectile dysfunction'}
{xeff 'vasoconstriction'}
{sev 'intense'} {xeff 'bronchodilation'}, increased breathing rate ({wkp 'hyperventilation'}) and uncomfortable feeling of not being able to breathe well enough ({wkp 'dyspnea'})
{sev 'light'} {xeff 'memory suppression'} (i forget things easier than usual)
{sev 'moderate'} {xeff 'cognitive fatigue'} (sometimes I feel retarded when someone ask me something and I find it difficult to obey orders more than sober)

decreased {xeff 'physical autonomy'} (mechanical and robotic movements) and {wkp 'alogia' 'feeling of being muted despite wanting to talk'} (like when you want to talk but don't have anything to say) during the {wkp 'comedown_(drugs)' 'comedown'}
{sev 'light'} {xeff 'difficulty urinating'}
{xeff 'increased-perspiration' 'excessive sweating'}, very {sev 'intense'} on hands ({wkp 'focal hyperhidrosis'}) during all the experience
{xeff 'increased-bodily-temperature' 'feeling of heat'} in the head during the comeup, probably because of nasal cavity numbing
{sev 'intense'} {xeff 'anxiety'} and {xeff 'irritability'} on {wkp 'comedown_(drugs)' 'comedown'}
long-lasting residual {xeff 'stimulation'} and {xeff 'cognitive-fatigue' 'mental exhaustion'}
ocasional {xeff 'spontaneous-physical-movements' 'random spasms'}

{sev 'light'} {xeff 'language suppression'} when talking because of {sev 'intense'} {xeff 'thought acceleration'} and {sev 'light'} {xeff 'thought disorganization'} (speaking so fast that people sometimes don't understand what i'm saying)
{wkp 'dry eyes'} due to infrequent blinking, {xeff 'vibrating-vision' 'rapid eye movements'} and eyes wide open (eyelid retraction)
Notes: the main effects of this experience like {xeff 'cognitive euphoria'}, {xeff 'stimulation'}, {xeff 'motivation-enhancement' 'motivation'} and {xeff 'empathy-affection-and-sociability-enhancement' 'sociability'} are {wkp 'drug interaction' 'dulled'} because of my {wkp 'psychiatric medication' 'medication'} ({class 'antidepressant' 'antidepressants'} and {class 'antipsychotic' 'antipsychotics'})

every time I use this substance ({sev 'strong'} doses) I get some {xeff 'paranoia'} and sometimes {xeff 'auditory-hallucinations' 'hear voices'} of people talking that i'm high ({xeff 'delusion' 'distrust of everyone, even those closest to me'}). This increases {xeff 'anxiety'} a lot

this substance has a very awful and long-acting {wkp 'comedown_(drugs)' 'comedown'}, especially if you {xeff 'compulsive-redosing' 'binge'} it with {xeff 'wakefulness' 'no sleep'} and {xeff 'appetite-suppression' 'no eating'}

when I use {sev 'strong'} doses, it's very hard to go unnoticed when you are under the influence. side effects like {xeff 'paranoid'} {xeff 'delusion' 'delusions'}, eyes wide open (eyelid retraction), {sev 'strong'} {xeff 'shakiness'} and {xeff 'anxiety'}, will increase noticeabe side effects even more ({wkp 'vicious circle'}). people will know you are {xeff 'sensory-overload' 'tweaking hard'}, trust me
I expected worse {wkp 'comedown_(drugs)' 'comedown'}, it wasn't that bad in my opinion (probably also {wkp 'drug interaction' 'dulled'} because of my {wkp 'psychiatric medication' 'medication'})

I tried {wkp 'polysubstance use' 'combining'} it with other potent {class 'stimulant' 'stimulants'} like {sub 'α-Pyrrolidinopentiophenone' 'α-PVP'} and it {wkp 'drug synergy' 'increased both desired and adverse effects'} like {xeff 'auditory-hallucination' 'auditory hallucinations'} and {xeff 'delusion' 'delusions'}
this substance tested {wkp 'negative diagnostic test' 'negative'} for everything in fast {wkp 'urine drug screen' '6-panel urine drug test'}

TriedSubstances.Name: Pentobarbital
Notes: Dangerous barbiturate, benzodiazepines are superior in almost all aspects but euphoria.
